overview: A comprehensive study website for IB Diploma Programme Computer Science students. Covers the full syllabus for both Standard Level and Higher Level, including Theme A (Concepts), Theme B (Computational Thinking), assessment guides, and curated resources.
features: Home page with course overview and quick facts
Full syllabus for Theme A (Computer Fundamentals, Networks, Databases, Machine Learning) and Theme B (Computational Thinking, Programming, OOP)
SL vs HL comparison with side-by-side breakdown
External and Internal Assessment guides with rubrics and tips
